case_title: SHIU HUANG KWAN VS. TRACY TSANG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-23-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BEFORE HEARING BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TSANG, TRACY

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, SHIU HUANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSANG, TRACY $3,211.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,211.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, SHIU HUANG AS TO DEFENDANT TSANG, TRACY DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATION, PHILIP A. SEGAL TO COUNSELS: RESCHEDULED ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: SEP-05-02 AT 2:00 PM.
ARBITRATOR PHILIP ALLAN SEGAL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-15-2002 THROUGH OCT-13-2002.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT, SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR - PHILIP S. SEGAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-03-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, SHIU HUANG SERVED APR-18-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSANG, TRACY
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, PHILIP A. SEGAL TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: AUGUST 27, 2002 @ 2:00 PM
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-15-2002. MAY-24-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-03-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED NOV-19-2002 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
